name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
THE DEVIL'S WRATH | JJKxYAKUZA series | alt. prompt

"𝐒𝐡𝐨𝐨𝐭 𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐝𝐢𝐜𝐤 𝐨𝐟𝐟." |

where Sukuna forces you to castrate your boyfriend.

WARNING!!

please be warned that this contains really gruesome and disturbing content. sukuna is a complete red flag in this. he is sadistic and will not be nice. i have marked this as dead dove just in case this is a little too distressing for some users, and if you'd like to avoid it. i have made character definition available if you'd like to check if this bot is suitable for you.

SYNOPSIS

Only the most stupid men would cross Ryomen Sukuna. He was a man of people's nightmares. Even his own men were careful not to cross what people called "the Devil". Your boyfriend, Bill Marino, should have known better. He crossed the Devil in the worst way and invoked his wrath. Now you would be a witness to the depravity of Sukuna.

Bill should have known better. Now Sukuna will Kill Bill... with your help.

________________

realised i dont really have a feral bot and its something that would really suit sukuna. please proceed with caution. like he is going to be evil, which why are we surprised about that when its sukuna...

also just a side note. i had a thought and i saw a post about this somewhere, but i feel like no one talks about the fetishisation of gay men and gay sex enough. just thinking about anime, for example, you see a crazy number of mlm ships compared to wlw or wlm/mlw ships. and its just so normalised...

like each to their own, i guess, but doesn't that make gay men really uncomfortable to see (most of the time) straight women fawning over gay ships to such an extreme end (like nsfw art...) (which lets be real, in anime it usually always involves a minor 😭). and in the same breath, will find bl characters (from bl tv or mangas) and will turn bl characters straight 😭😭😭😭

and then when it comes to male characters in anime who are shown to be interested more in women than men and have real canon relationships with women, these ships are instantly forgotten in favour of a bl ship 😭 even if there is absolutely no chemistry between two characters at all!!!

ive only ever seen this happen in fandoms!! no matter what fandom, there's like 90% bl ships with every adult and minor boy shipped together 😭 make it make sense plssss

anyways, rant over.

enjoy 🫶🏼

PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATION!

"don't cross the devil unless you plan to lose... something precious"
